scope: read-only post-failure audit of the single seed-5601 EMA checkpoint; no training and no H1b-H6
decision_boundary: If low-noise teacher-forced calibration remains weak, repair representation/optimization. If calibration is strong but step refinement is nonconvergent, audit the torus reverse kernel. This diagnostic cannot authorize more training, H1b, tensor conditioning, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
